patch.value: list/search --tags hard-refuses (exit 2) while create --tag auto-corrects — accept --tags as a never-block alias

agent-UX audit F4: read commands use --tag, write commands use --tags; only create/update degrade gracefully. list --tags returns 'Refusing to auto-correct' exit 2 (dead-end). Accept --tags as a single-value alias on list/search (never-block) or downgrade the refusal to a warn + run corrected.
